title: T-078 — Approval criteria (C1-C7) evaluator Server Action (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-078 — Approval criteria evaluator

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.5 (7-criteria summary card)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action evaluateApprovalCriteria(productCode) returning {C1..C7: 'pass'|'warn'|'pending'} derived from V01-V08 + risk + compliance docs state. Backs the Approval screen's 7-criteria summary card.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/domain/src/approval/evaluate-criteria.ts pure helper given inputs (formulation, nutrition, costing, sensory, allergens, risks, docs) → 7-criteria result.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/_actions/evaluate.ts: Server Action that loads inputs from DB and invokes helper.
3. Each criterion mapped per §17.11.5: C1 formulations.locked_at not null; C2 nutri_score grade in {A,B,C}; C3 margin >=15%; C4 sensory mean >=7.0 (or N/A if D4 reduces); C5 allergens audited V07 PASS; C6 0 Open High risks (V18); C7 compliance docs valid + non-expired.
4. Vitest covers each criterion's pass/warn/pending paths.

## Files
- packages/domain/src/approval/evaluate-criteria.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/approval/__tests__/evaluate-criteria.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/_actions/evaluate.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/_actions/__tests__/evaluate.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a formulation with locked_at NULL, when evaluateApprovalCriteria runs, then C1 returns 'pending' per §17.11.5 C1 condition
2. Given an FA with one Open High-bucket risk, when evaluateApprovalCriteria runs, then C6 returns 'warn' (or 'fail' depending on V18 contract) per §17.11.5 C6 + §18 V18
3. Given all inputs satisfied (locked, nutriScore=B, margin=20%, sensory=8.0, allergen audited, no high risk, docs valid), when evaluateApprovalCriteria runs, then all 7 criteria return 'pass' per §17.11.5

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/evaluate-criteria.test.ts (per-criterion isolated paths) + __tests__/evaluate.test.ts (action with seeded inputs) before functions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter domain test evaluate-criteria && pnpm --filter web test evaluate'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass V18 risk-blocker semantics in C6
- Do not treat C7 'expired' as pass
- Do not return 'pass' when sensory not yet measured (must be 'pending')

pipeline_inputs.description: Pure-function evaluateApprovalCriteria + Server Action returning C1-C7 pass/warn/pending per §17.11.5.
pipeline_inputs.details: Pure helper accepts denormalised inputs. Action loads inputs from DB. Per-criterion mapping documented inline.

Given an FA with one Open High-bucket risk, when evaluateApprovalCriteria runs, then C6 returns 'warn' or 'fail' per §17.11.5 C6 + §18 V18

Given all inputs satisfied (locked, nutriScore=B, margin=20%, sensory=8.0, allergen audited, no high risk, docs valid), when evaluateApprovalCriteria runs, then all 7 criteria return 'pass' per §17.11.5
